name: Bilig WorkPaper MCP formula engine for n8n agents

parameters.content:
## Bilig WorkPaper MCP

Calls the public Bilig WorkPaper MCP endpoint, writes a formula into a demo workbook, and verifies calculated readback + restore proof.

No Excel, browser automation, credentials, or local files required.

Repo: https://github.com/proompteng/bilig

nodes.name: Bilig MCP: write formula and verify

main.node: Bilig MCP: write formula and verify
